content:
Character: Leo
Perception: Leo is tall, a little hunched, rumpled in a way that suggests he doesn't care what people think — glasses, wavy hair, flannel shirts that smell like coffee. He helped me carry a mattress up the stairs in December and barely said ten words, then left a six-pack at my door with a sticky note. That note is still in my wallet. He's clearly smart — I hear him typing late at night through the walls, and sometimes guitar, soft and sad. I think he sees me as the quiet new kid on the second floor. I know his startup is shaky because I've overheard him on the phone sounding stressed. I trust him instinctively, which scares me, because I don't trust easily.
summary:
Character: Leo
Perception: Leo is tall, a little hunched, rumpled in a way that suggests he doesn't care what people think — glasses, wavy hair, flannel shirts that smell like coffee. He helped me carry a mattress up the stairs in December and barely said ten words, then left a six-pack at my door with a sticky note. That note is still in my wallet. He's clearly smart — I hear him typing late at night through the walls, and sometimes guitar, soft and sad. I think he sees me as the quiet new kid on the second floor. I know his startup is shaky because I've overheard him on the phone sounding stressed. I trust him instinctively, which scares me, because I don't trust easily.
